title: Robustly Spiced Greek Meat Keftedes
description: A flavorful Greek dish featuring herbal notes and a spicy kick, made with sriracha and cooked in a papillote, perfect for a low-glycemic diet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, chopped onion, minced garlic, sriracha, dried oregano, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Add the egg and almond flour to the bowl and mix until the mixture is homogeneous.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small keftedes, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Place the keftedes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each keftede.
Fold the parchment paper over the keftedes to create a papillote and bake for 18 minutes.
Remove the keftedes from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the keftedes hot, garnished with fresh parsley or dill if desired.
